cobbler.name: cobbler_hammer
cobbler.description: The cobbler's hammer. Looks like any old hammer, but its tail is solid and curved.
dialogue: Shoe or a skull on its business end, the hammer will hammer regardless.
And that sharp bit sure ain't pretty.
Get a load of that stain.
Doesn't look like shoe polish to me.

fishing.name: harpoon
fishing.description: The harpoon. A big, barbed spear used for fishing.
dialogue: Sharp. Heavy, too
This thing could take down one big fish.
Gotta know how to handle a tool like this.
Wouldn't want to be the fish to meet this thing's wielder.

carpentry.name: claw_hammer
carpentry.description: Claw hammer. I got one of these, but without the bells and whistles.
dialogue: What have you been used for, Mr. Hammer?
Drive a nail into hardwood? Drive a skull into pieces?
Honest. Wouldn't even have to swing very hard.
Hmph. That stain doesn't look like rust to me.

archery.name: arrow
archery.description: An arrow. Pretty quiver, ugly tip.
dialogue: Not an easy hobby, archery. Not safe, either.
You'd do well to stay well away from the business end of a bow.
Hm. Interesting stain there.
Looks like this one wasn't just used for practice.

medicine.name: poison
medicine.description: Well, this sure isn't a healing tonic, now is it?
dialogue: Wouldn't want a spoonful of this stuff...
What does a doctor need a vial of poison for, anyway?
It'd give you one hell of a stomach ache.
Right before you keel over.

cobbler.name: shoes
cobbler.description: A pile of shoes in varying level of disrepair.
dialogue: Seems a skilled cobbler fixed these right up
Brand new nails in the sole.
Woulda needed a specialized hammer.

cobbler.name: cobbler_customer_invoices
dialogue: Looks like Enfrin owns this shop.
This wildly popular shop, that is.
Well done Enfrin. Must be real handy with that hammer.

fishing.name: rowboat
dialogue: Registered to Enfrin. Interesting
Looks like it's got a harpoon rack built-in. Convenient.

carpentry.name: lumber
dialogue: Lots of supply. Must get good business, here.
Hardwood. Fixed with nails, not screws.
Bet the owner of this shop has a trusty hammer.

carpentry.name: carpentry_customer_invoices
dialogue: Looks like Sil owns this shop.
Well, well done Sil.
Must be real handy with that hammer of yours.

archery.name: target
dialogue: One hell of a shooter practiced with this.
Look at all those bullseyes.

medicine.name: medicine
dialogue: So many tonics.
One wrong ingredient and healing turns to hurting.
Gotta be real well-read to know what you're doing with this stuff.

medicine.name: medicine_customer_invoices
dialogue: Looks like Chorg owns this shop.
Must now your way around tonics.
And their nastier counterparts. Poison.

library.name: books
dialogue: 'Do's and Don't's of Tonic Crafting.' Gotta know how to make poison to avoid it? Right.
'The Perfect Crime.' No such thing.

library.name: borrow_list
dialogue: Chorg spent a lot of time here. Reading all about tonic crafting.
'How To Get Away With Murder.' Oh Chorg. What do you need to know that for?
Looks like Chorg recently borrowed...'100 Deadly Plants to Avoid.' Hah. Right. Avoid

chorg.name: books
dialogue: 'Tonics 101.' OK, medicine man.
'100 Deadly Plants to Avoid.' Uh-huh...
'How To Get Away With Murder.' Not a good look.

chorg.name: sil_portrait
dialogue: Lovebird.

enfrin.name: sil_portrait
dialogue: Weird.

enfrin.name: fountain_pen
enfrin.description: This pen has seen some use, alright.
dialogue: Waxing poetic, Enfrin?

sil.name: anon_love_letter
sil.description: A love letter, huh? Signed from anonymous.
dialogue: Looks like it was written with a fountain pen.
